name: Rightmove UK Property Portal API
what_it_does: Rightmove UK property portal REST API for estate agents, property developers, and PropTech companies to manage property listings, access property data, retrieve valuation estimates, and analyze UK property market trends — the UK's largest property portal with 90%+ market share among UK home buyers. Enables AI agents to manage property listing for UK estate agent catalog automation, handle listing update for property status management automation, access property search for UK buyer and renter discovery automation, retrieve property analytics for market trend reporting automation, manage lead management for enquiry processing automation, handle valuation data for pricing intelligence automation, access sold prices for comparable analysis automation, retrieve rental market data for landlord portfolio automation, manage branch performance for estate agency analytics automation, and integrate Rightmove with estate agency CRM, property management, and PropTech platforms for end-to-end UK property market automation.
use_cases: Syndicating UK property listings to Rightmove for estate agency marketing automation agents
Accessing UK property sold prices and market data for property valuation automation agents
Managing buyer and renter enquiry leads from Rightmove for estate agency CRM automation agents
Analyzing UK property market trends and price indices for investment research automation agents
not_for: Non-UK property markets (Rightmove is UK-only property portal)
Commercial property at scale (Rightmove is primarily residential; use CoStar for commercial)
Direct-to-consumer property buying (Rightmove is marketing portal, not transaction platform)
best_when: A UK estate agent, property developer, or PropTech platform wanting AI agents to syndicate property listings, manage leads, and access UK property market data through Rightmove's dominant UK residential property portal.
avoid_when: ESTATE AGENT MEMBERSHIP REQUIRED: Rightmove API access requires active Rightmove estate agent membership or PropTech partner status; automated self-service API assumption creates no access; automated must be registered Rightmove member or approved technology supplier. LISTING UPLOAD HAS FORMAT REQUIREMENTS: Rightmove uses RTDF (Rightmove Technology Data Feed) format for listing uploads; automated generic JSON listing creates format rejection; automated must use Rightmove-specified data format for property listing upload. API IS PRIMARILY DATA FEED: Rightmove's technical integration is primarily data feed based (BLM/RTDF format) rather than pure REST; automated modern REST-only assumption creates format mismatch; automated may need to handle legacy BLM file format alongside newer APIs. LEAD ROUTING IS REAL-TIME: Rightmove buyer enquiries route in real-time; automated delayed lead handling creates missed buyer contacts; automated must process Rightmove leads promptly.

auth.notes: Rightmove uses API key for technology supplier access. Data feed (BLM/RTDF) + REST APIs. London, UK HQ. Founded 2000 by four major UK property groups (Countrywide, Halifax, Persimmon, Connells). LSE:RMV (FTSE 100). Products: Residential sales and lettings, commercial, new homes, overseas property, sold prices, analytics. SDKs: None public. 90%+ UK buyer market share. 20,000+ estate agent branches. 1M+ properties listed. Competes with Zoopla for UK property portal dominance.

pricing.free_tier_limits: API access included with Rightmove membership subscription; no separate free API tier
pricing.paid_tiers: Estate agent subscription: monthly membership fee (varies by location and listing volume); technology partner: revenue share or flat fee
pricing.notes: London UK. FTSE 100 (LSE:RMV). Membership subscription. API included with membership. UK residential focus.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; listing upload throttled; analytics API throttled per membership tier

known_agent_gotchas: ESTATE AGENT MEMBERSHIP IS PREREQUISITE: Rightmove API requires active Rightmove membership; automated developer API key assumption creates membership required error; automated must be registered Rightmove member before API access is possible

RTDF/BLM FORMAT FOR LISTINGS: Rightmove listing uploads use RTDF (or legacy BLM) property data format, not generic JSON; automated standard JSON listing payload creates format_rejected error; automated must implement Rightmove-specific RTDF data format

LISTING SYNC IS FEED-BASED: Rightmove operates on feed-push model for listings; automated real-time individual property update assumption creates throttling; automated should batch listing updates in scheduled feeds

SOLD PRICES DATA IS PUBLIC BUT RATE LIMITED: Rightmove's sold prices API is available but rate limited; automated unlimited historical data pull creates rate_limit_exceeded; automated must implement rate-aware pagination for historical data retrieval

AML COMPLIANCE FOR PROPERTY TRANSACTIONS: UK property market requires AML checks; automated property transaction without AML verification creates regulatory exposure; automated estate agency integrations must comply with UK AML property regulations
agent_readiness.security_notes: UK property portal. UK GDPR, AML property regulations. API key. UK. Property and customer enquiry data.

security_score_components.security_notes: UK property portal. UK GDPR, AML. API key. UK. Property listing and customer data.
